html:
Exclusive to:

Juicy Berries are a Food Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, they can be found on Juicy Berry Bushes. Harvesting a Juicy Berry Bush yields 3 Juicy Berries, which will fall to the ground instead and need to be picked up.

Roasted Juicy Berries

Roasted Juicy Berries are made when a Juicy Berry is cooked over a Campfire, Fire Pit, or a Star. As for uncooked Juicy Berries, Roasted Juicy Berries restore slightly more hunger and health than their Cooked Berry counterpart, but spoil even faster.

Compared to the normal Berries, Juicy Berries provide 33% more and additional 1 when raw, and 50% more and 2 additional when cooked, however they also spoil 3 times faster.

Juicy Berries can be used in the same Crock Pot recipes as regular Berries. Gobblers can eat Juicy Berries off their bushes and off the ground as they do with regular Berries.

Tips

  • Since Juicy Berries spoil three times faster than normal Berries, they are an easy way to get Rot quickly.
  • Juicy Berries don't spoil until they are harvested, so when farming them, it may be a good idea to leave them on the bush and harvest only when necessary.
  • Because of Roasted Juicy Berries' excellent hunger value, it's slightly more hunger-efficient to roast Juicy Berries instead of cooking them into Meatballs. However, stockpiled Juicy Berries will spoil quickly, so cooking them into Meatballs trades hunger value for much longer spoilage time.
  • While cooking Juicy Berries into Fists Full of Jam wastes over half of their hunger value, Fists Full of Jam last for 15 days and can be used to save Juicy Berries in a pinch.

Trivia

  • Juicy Berries and Juicy Berry Bushes are considered to be part of A New Reign, even though they were introduced before the official start of the beta branch.
  • There is a Diseased version of Juicy Berries in the game files, even though Diseased Juicy Berry Bushes only drop Rot.

Gallery

  • Icon used as emoji for Official Klei Discord.
  • Diseased Juicy Berries on a bush.
  • Unimplemented Diseased Juicy Berries.
  • Unimplemented Diseased Juicy Berries.
  • Juicy Berries Used for Fishing

"berries_juicy"
“Extra tasty, though they won't last long.”
–Wilson, when examining Juicy Berries.
“Mmm. They pop in your mouth.”
–Willow, when examining Juicy Berries.
“Is extra sweet and juicy!”
–Wolfgang, when examining Juicy Berries.
“I'd better consume these before death does.”
–Wendy, when examining Juicy Berries.
“THESE BIOSPHERES WILL ROT SOON.”
–WX-78, when examining Juicy Berries.
“A variant of Ardisia crenata berries. Good hydration.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining Juicy Berries.
“That's good eatin', eh?”
–Woodie, when examining Juicy Berries.
“Delightfully sweet with a subtle hint of tartness.”
–Maxwell, when examining Juicy Berries.
“I'd prefer a juicy steak.”
–Wigfrid, when examining Juicy Berries.
“Yum! Let's find more!”
–Webber, when examining Juicy Berries.
“What a unique, tangy flavor.”
–Warly, when examining Juicy Berries.
“Tiny squishy belly fillers”
–Wormwood, when examining Juicy Berries.
“They're so juicy!”
–Winona, when examining Juicy Berries.
“Mortals eat them as a snack.”
–Wortox, when examining Juicy Berries.
“Ooooh, big tasty!”
–Wurt, when examining Juicy Berries.
“Yes! These are the best kind!”
–Walter, when examining Juicy Berries.
“Their time is fleeting, and they taste all the sweeter for it.”
–Wanda, when examining Juicy Berries.

“Better eat them before they spoil!”
–Wilson, when examining Roasted Juicy Berries.
“Fire improves everything.”
–Willow, when examining Roasted Juicy Berries.
“Sweet, juicy berries ready for eating!”
–Wolfgang, when examining Roasted Juicy Berries.
“This hasn't halted the decay, merely stalled it.”
–Wendy, when examining Roasted Juicy Berries.
“SUCCULENT”
–WX-78, when examining Roasted Juicy Berries.
“Spoilage is a constant threat.”
–Wickerbottom, when examining Roasted Juicy Berries.
“Mmm. These'd be perfect with some syrup.”
–Woodie, when examining Roasted Juicy Berries.
“They're quite delicious, actually.”
–Maxwell, when examining Roasted Juicy Berries.
“Yöu're nöt meat.”
–Wigfrid, when examining Roasted Juicy Berries.
“They're so filling!”
–Webber, when examining Roasted Juicy Berries.
“I'd have preferred to cook them into a proper dish.”
–Warly, when examining Roasted Juicy Berries.
“Squish, squish!”
–Wormwood, when examining Roasted Juicy Berries.
“They're still pretty darn juicy.”
–Winona, when examining Roasted Juicy Berries.
“I hear they last longer this way.”
–Wortox, when examining Roasted Juicy Berries.
“Wanna eat them all!”
–Wurt, when examining Roasted Juicy Berries.
“I should eat these fast.”
–Walter, when examining Roasted Juicy Berries.
“That turned out better than I expected.”
–Wanda, when examining Roasted Juicy Berries.
Roasted Juicy Berries are made when a Juicy Berry is cooked over a Campfire, Fire Pit, or a Star. As for uncooked Juicy Berries, Roasted Juicy Berries restore slightly more hunger and health than their Cooked Berry counterpart, but spoil even faster.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Quả mọng ngon ngọt là một Vật phẩm Thực phẩm độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together, chúng có thể được tìm thấy trên Bụi Dâu mọng nước. Thu hoạch một bụi dâu ngon sẽ mang lại 3 quả mọng mọng, thay vào đó chúng sẽ rơi xuống đất và cần được nhặt lên.
